prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约14051名→14420名→14028名→16134名→16192名。2021–2023年位次基本稳定在14000–14400区间，2024年出现明显后移（较2023年后移约2100名），2025年与2024年基本持平（仅后移58名），近两年基准位次稳定在16100–16200区间；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划：2021年93人→2022年76人→2023年62人→2024年71人→2025年74人→2026年79人。2026年计划较2025年增加5人（扩招约6.8%），扩招意味着竞争略有缓和，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，非985。软科中国大学排名近年分别为：2021年第43名→2022年第46名→2023年第48名→2024年第56名→2025年第61名→2026年第60名，整体排名在50–61区间波动，属于中上水平211院校，位于上海市，地域优势明显；2026年高考周期声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要涉及学术不端（院长论文造假被通报）、学校管理回应等事件，共7条信号（6条负面、1条中性），可能对部分考生的报考意愿产生一定抑制。抖音热度排名第48位（较热），15条样本视频综合热度约81.6万，曝光度处于中上水平。历史投档异常记录中未见上海大学相关断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，社会学获评A，世界史获评A-，为该校仅有的两个A-及以上学科。社会学类（含社会学）对应A级学科，历史学类对应世界史A-学科，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏高（高热推荐/推荐），这些专业在上海大学招生计划中占比较大；经济学类热度分化观望。浙江省考生总数：2021年25.3万→2022年26.9万→2023年27.8万→2024年28.1万→2025年29.1万→2026年约40.0万（普通高考总人数），2026年考生规模大幅增长约37.6%，竞争压力显著上升。；上海大学位于上海市，对浙江省考生具有较强地域吸引力（地理位置邻近、长三角一体化）。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+5人）对位次有轻微后推作用；浙江省考生总数大幅增长（+37.6%）是竞争加剧的最关键因素，将推动位次进一步后移；声誉负面事件可能小幅抑制报考热度，但上海大学211层次+上海地域优势仍具较强吸引力。在2025年基准位次16192名基础上，经，预测2026年最低录取位次约16999名，区间16499–17499名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约16999名，区间16499–17499名。建议位次在16500名以内的考生可将一档专业（文科试验班类、计算机科学与技术）作为冲刺目标；位次在16500–17200名的考生以二 档专业（电子信息类、电气类、理科试验班类）为主攻方向；位次在17200名以上的考生可重点考虑三档专业（经济学类、材料类）作为保底选择。上海大学作为211院校且位于上 海，整体性价比突出，建议结合个人兴趣与专业热度综合决策。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 14051 → 14420 → 14028 → 16134 → 16192. Rankings were basically stable in the 14000–14400 range from 2021 to 2023, with a significant backward shift in 2024 (about 2100 places behind 2023), and 2025 was essentially flat with 2024 (only 58 places behind). The baseline ranking for the past two years has stabilized in the 16100–16200 range. The enrollment plan for Shanghai University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category: 2021: 93 → 2022: 76 → 2023: 62 → 2024: 71 → 2025: 74 → 2026: 79. The 2026 plan increases by 5 students compared to 2025 (an expansion of about 6.8%), which means competition slightly eases, but the extent is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, not a 985. Its recent rankings in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings: 2021: 43rd → 2022: 46th → 2023: 48th → 2024: 56th → 2025: 61st → 2026: 60th, fluctuating in the 50–61 range, belonging to the upper-middle level 211 universities. Located in Shanghai, it has obvious geographical advantages. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'clearly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct (dean's paper fabrication reported) and school management responses, with a total of 7 signals (6 negative, 1 neutral), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 48th (relatively hot), with 15 sample videos having a comprehensive popularity of about 816,000, indicating mid-to-high exposure. No related signal of missing slots in historical submission anomaly records for Shanghai University. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Sociology was rated A, and World History was rated A-, the only two A- and above disciplines at the university. The Sociology category (including Sociology) corresponds to an A-level discipline, and the History category corresponds to the World History A- discipline, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (highly recommended/recommended), and these majors account for a large proportion of Shanghai University's enrollment plan. The popularity of Economics categories is divided and wait-and-see. Total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province: 2021: 253,000 → 2022: 269,000 → 2023: 278,000 → 2024: 281,000 → 2025: 291,000 → 2026: approximately 400,000 (total number of general college entrance examination candidates). In 2026, the candidate scale grows significantly by about 37.6%, leading to a notable increase in competition pressure. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Zhejiang candidates (geographical proximity, Yangtze River Delta integration).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: The slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+5 students) has a slight backward-pushing effect on rankings; the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province (+37.6%) is the most critical factor intensifying competition, which will push rankings further back; negative reputation events may slightly suppress application enthusiasm, but Shanghai University's 211 level plus Shanghai's geographical advantages still have strong appeal. Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 16192, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 16999, with a range of 16499–17499.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 16999, range 16499–17499. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 16500 can aim for Tier 1 majors (Liberal Arts Experimental Class, Computer Science and Technology) as sprint targets; candidates with rankings between 16500–17200 should focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Category, Electrical Category, Science Experimental Class) as main directions; candidates with rankings above 17200 can consider Tier 3 majors (Economics Category, Materials Category) as safe choices. As a 211 university located in Shanghai, Shanghai University offers outstanding overall value, and it is recommended to make decisions based on personal interests and major popularity.
